items.title: Is Carrick proving Amorim's Man Utd tenure was a wasted year?
items.summary: A third win in a row for Michael Carrick highlights the failures of Ruben Amorim's time at Manchester United

items.title: Immobile naar Ligue 1, nieuwe buitenspeler voor Juventus
items.summary: De tijd van winterse versterkingen is aangebroken, in dit blog volgen we alle transferactiviteit in het buitenland. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in Nederland.

items.title: Carrick's calm amid the chaos is exactly what Man ...
items.summary: Michael Carrick has three wins from three games in charge at Man United and has only made one change to the team. He is keeping things simple.

items.title: European live updates: Tottenham comeback spoils M...
items.summary: Here is a look back at Sunday's Premier League action as it happened via our live blog.

items.title: VI Live: foutje Van Oevelen leidt de openingstreffer van Go Ahead in
items.summary: Welkom in de VI Live van zondag 1 februari. Hier nemen we je mee in drie Eredivisie-duels, een topper in Engeland en alle andere hoogtepunten op de (inter)nationale velden.

items.title: Ajax toont al zijn beperkingen aan Jordi Cruijff
items.summary: Ajax heeft zichzelf zondagmiddag lelijk in de vingers gesneden. Ook op bezoek bij promovendus Excelsior ging het maar weer eens mis in de tweede helft: 2-2. Voor technisch directeur Jordi Cruijff, die op de tribune zat, was het nog maar eens de bevestiging dat hem een zware klus staat te wachten. 'Het is gewoon heel erg fragiel.'

items.title: Fulham keert met 35 miljoen euro voor Pepi terug bij PSV
items.summary: De transfer van Ricardo Pepi naar Fulham komt er mogelijk alsnog. De Engelse club is teruggekeerd bij PSV en zou bereid zijn om 35 miljoen euro te betalen. PSV wil de spits echter niet meer laten gaan deze winter. Een deal voor de zomer is ook een optie.

items.title: Solanke dents Manchester City’s title hopes with stirring comeback for Spurs
items.summary: At the end of a truly wild occasion, this the definition of the game of two halves, it was difficult to state the case for Manchester City’s Premier League title-winning aspirations. The manner of their second-half capitulation saw to that. If they were impressive before the interval, they were so brittle thereafter, blown off course after Tottenham stirred. Pep Guardiola was beside himself with frustration on the touchline. Continue reading...

items.title: Bellingham injured for Madrid, 'an important loss'...
items.summary: Jude Bellingham was substituted early in Real Madrid's LaLiga game with Rayo Vallecano on Sunday, forced off with what appeared to be a hamstring injury.

items.title: Carrick hails 'big talent' Sesko after United winn...
items.summary: Michael Carrick called Benjamin Sesko a "big talent" after the Manchester United forward climbed off the substitutes' bench to score a stoppage-time winner in the 3-2 Old Trafford victory against Fulham.

items.title: Spurs fight back vs City, Arsenal 6 clear at top
items.summary: A rip-roaring second-half from Tottenham saw them fight back from two goals down to claim a 2-2 draw at home to Manchester City and boost fierce rivals Arsenal's title bid.

items.title: PSV bouwt verder op het Peter Bosz-fundament
items.summary: Peter Bosz is de komende jaren trainer van PSV, maakte de club bekend op de dag dat het Philips Stadion – op 1 februari nota bene – vrolijk over een aanstaand kampioenschap zong nadat Feyenoord doodeenvoudig opzijgezet werd.

items.title: World Masters darts LIVE! Littler plays Price in semi-final showdown

items.summary: Manchester City's victory over Chelsea was confirmation they are the best team in the country this season and they are the WSL champions in waiting.

items.title: Banton clubs England to T20 series win on record day for Buttler
items.summary: Jos Buttler's record-setting 402nd England appearance came in a series-sealing victory as captain Harry Brook's cameo and Tom Banton's half-century smoked the tourists to a six-wicket win in a rain-trimmed second T20 against Sri Lanka in Pallekele.

items.title: Wolves accept reduced £48m offer for Strand Larsen
items.summary: Wolves have accepted a reduced offer worth £48m for striker Jorgen Strand Larsen from Crystal Palace.

items.title: Sesko seals dramatic win over Fulham to continue Manchester United revival
items.summary: Benjamin Sesko will never forget the stoppage-time pirouette and finish in front of the Stretford End that burst Bernd Leno’s net and earned Manchester United a memorable victory over Fulham. Just 180 seconds earlier Kevin had curled a peach of an equaliser past Senne Lammens that hushed the Old Trafford faithful and seemed to have grabbed a point for the visitors. Continue reading...
